judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent had the right plan to filter commits by eligible repos but implemented the cross-database join incorrectly—first referencing metadata tables directly from DuckDB (call_WJYDRv4RUj1EGd99sRs0q1pu) and then via sqlite_scan without a file path (call_keGL5O0NqrLbdrIdSzjuKa0U), leading it to give up and return an inability message instead of executing a workable IN-based approach to obtain the count.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent had a correct approach but its execute_python step failed with a "SyntaxError: Invalid star expression" while constructing the SQL query (using a triple-quoted f-string), so it never executed the count and returned an error message instead of the numeric result.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly retrieving the target repository names from metadata_database, the agent's count query failed by incorrectly attempting to reference "metadata_database.languages" via DuckDB's read_csv_auto (repo_name IN (SELECT repo_name FROM read_csv_auto('metadata_database.languages'))) and then a follow-up execute_python step to build an IN-list crashed with a SyntaxError, so no valid result was produced.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After retrieving the Shell+Apache-2.0 repo list from metadata_database (call_yBgoLI7vx8huym8DOYHbmPcx), the agent first attempted an unsupported cross-database subquery in DuckDB (call_77ZTdkmMZAriEtWfa1tKcd6y), then generated very large IN-clause queries (call_d85rKzZDmWtyopRAbZXKnWjx) but executed one that was truncated/unterminated (call_VFa0W7WwzyI9xwLX0QuOGuXF), resulting in a parser error and returning "Unable to compute" instead of the count.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent had a correct plan to count filtered commit messages but implemented it incorrectly by attempting to access the SQLite metadata_database from DuckDB using sqlite_scan (calls call_shQwO5lWBLdJxgD6na2d4HFW and call_6noxXcEK1Cyxo6U3ZI3lU20b), causing execution errors and resulting in returning an error message instead of the numeric count.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
